title: Lawn Mowing Simulator 2
subtitle: UI Developer | Skyhook Games | Professional
description: Contributed as a UI Developer at Skyhook Games on Lawn Mowing Simulator 2, implementing and creating UI screens based on Figma design specifications.

highlights.name: UI Implementation
highlights.detail: Implemented and built UI screens from scratch based on provided Figma design mockups.

highlights.name: Figma to Unity Pipeline
highlights.detail: Translated designer layouts and specifications into fully functional, polished in-game UI screens.

highlights.name: Designer Collaboration
highlights.detail: Worked closely with designers to ensure visual accuracy and a high quality player-facing experience.

roles: Implemented UI screens based on Figma design specifications
Translated designer mockups into functional in-game UI
Collaborated with designers to ensure visual accuracy and quality
details: As a UI Developer at Skyhook Games, I worked on Lawn Mowing Simulator 2 implementing and creating UI screens based on Figma design specifications. My work involved translating designer mockups into fully functional and polished in-game UI, ensuring visual accuracy and a smooth player experience.
